comment.body:
Why not buy longer dated put and then play the intraday call buying for the spikes?  Is Alma worried that the put has too much premium and it wont be as profitable?

Given the size of the grind lower, if you are unhedged with that put, does that premium matter if the drift is just going to pay you?
